name: post40_hp_leaderboard_save37
objective: HP leaderboard result after save37 / post-40 continuation
continuous_note: This artifact is a reproducible continuation from browser save slot 37, not yet a single generated 1F-to-clear continuous proof. For a full-game claim, concatenate and verify the earlier 1F-40F route with this walk.

verified_live_state.method: CDP live replay against the real h5mota page using map-click handlers and game keyboard event handling for the final adjacent boss trigger.
verified_live_state.save42: Written after the final redKing battle while the victory text event was open.

key_improvements_over_21764_tail: After the final MT46 HP shop, clear fixed zero-damage monsters on MT47 and MT48 for 1200G total.
Spend 1000G at MT31 x1y11 for 4 yellow keys and 1 blue key.
Use the bought blue key to open the MT20 right-side pocket and collect the yellow key, red potion, blue potion, and final bat gold.
Use remaining yellow keys for final yellow-door potion cleanup before the superPotion and 50F boss.
notes: MT31 trader text/effect was verified in live game data: 1000G -> 4YK + 1BK.
MT20 cleanup adds 500 HP from potions and leaves enough keys for the final route.
The final h5mota prompt after victory can be navigated with left/right selection and Space/Enter; this summary records the route state before submitting to the ranking prompt.
